choices.text: Random secret in URL + Bearer token + IP whitelist + HMAC signature. Anyone with URL can POST to public endpoint. Layer defenses to prevent unauthorized order placement.

questions.explanation: Auth + secret + IP whitelist for webhook safety.

choices.text: Idempotency keys: orderId = ticker + bar_time; check store before placing; mark placed after success. TradingView retries on transient failure; idempotency prevents double-fill.

questions.explanation: Idempotency keys prevent double orders on retries.
